name: slider
description: A range input with draggable thumbs. Supports single value, ranges (two thumbs), custom steps, and full keyboard control.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled array of thumb values (number[]), e.g. [50] for single, [20, 80] for range

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Default array of thumb values (number[]) for uncontrolled usage

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Callback on value change: (value: number[]) => void

ai.whenToUse: Use for continuous numeric inputs with a known range: volume, brightness, price range filter, opacity. Pair value with a visible number display when the exact value matters.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use when the user needs to enter an exact number (use Input type=number). Don't use for discrete choices (use Select or RadioGroup).
commonMistakes: Using Slider for exact values without showing the number
Using step=1 for fractional values (set step=0.01)
Not providing aria-label when there's no visible label
ai.accessibilityNotes: Arrow keys step by step, Home/End jump to min/max, PageUp/PageDown step larger. Radix handles aria-valuemin/max/now. Add aria-label if no visible label.
